description: Topology and resolution-transfer analysis using validation-selected checkpoints; this is not a retrained high-resolution benchmark.
notes: For 256x256, the minimum connected-road component and start-goal distance are scaled from the 128x128 planning protocol.
The 256x256 model evaluation reuses 128x128-trained fully convolutional checkpoints and should be interpreted as a diagnostic transfer check, not as a fully retrained high-resolution benchmark.
The topology analysis compares the 256x256 ground-truth road mask with a 128x128 mask upsampled back to 256x256 to quantify road-geometry loss caused by coarse semantic messaging.
